raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Mohsus: Es
jelle no-eefchu / un apraudfifchu
fcho leelu Rahdifchann / kadeht
tas Ehrfschkn Kruhms ne fa-
Deg.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS redfeja/
ka wiꞥſch gahje luhtkoht/tad fauze
Deews us winnu no ta Ehrfsch-
fu Kruhma widdu / un fazzt-
ja: Mohsus! Mohsus! un wiꞥſch
fazzija: Reds fche es efmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas fazztja : Ne nahz
tuwu fchurp/ iſwelz tawas Kur-
pes no tawahm Rahjahm / jo ta
Weeta / wirs ka tu stahw/ irr
fwehta Semme.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas fazzija: Es efmu
tawa Tehwa Deews/ tas Deews
Ahbraama/ tas Deews Jhsääka/
un tas Deews Jehkaba. Un
Mohsus aisklahje fawu Waigu/
jo wiꞥſch bihjahahs Deewu us-
luhfoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS fazztja:
Es teefcham efmu eeraudfijis
manno Lauschu Behdas / kas E-
giptes-Semmê irr/ un efmu win-
no Brehfschannu pahr winzo
Dfinnejeem klaufijs/ jo es efmu
winzo Sahpes wehra nehmis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht efmu es nolaidees/
tohs no to Egipteru Rohkas is-
pestiht/ un tohs no fchahs Seim-
mes augfcham west us weenu
labbu un plattu Semmi/ us wee-
nu Semini / kas ar Peenu un
Meddu tekk/ us to Kananiteru/
Cetiteru/ un Amoriteru/un We-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un nu reds/Israëka
no Brehfschana irr preek
nahkusi/ un es arri efinu
to Nespaidischann/ ar ko
gipteri tohs nospatda.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad uu eij/ es ter
schu us Waraii / un tu
mannus Laudis tohs
Behrnus no Egiptes-Ser
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Mo
Deewu : Kahds es efinu
eetu pee Waraiis/ un ka
Israëta Behrnus no Egi
westu?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas fazzija : O
schu ar tewim/ un schi bu
ta Sihne/ ka es tew efm
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Mohsus fazz
Deewu: Reds/ kad es pe
eza Behrneem nahzis u
fazzischu : Juhfu Tehwu
irr mann pee jums juhti
tee us man fakta / kas irr
Wahrdg? fo buhs man u
fazztht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija De
Mohsu : ES BUHS
RAS GS BUHSGH
wiꞥſch fazzija/ ta buhs
Israëta Behrneem fazzib
BUHSGHU / irr ma
jums fuhtijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Deews fazzii
us Mohsu: Ta buhs tew
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
